name: Tres Leches Cake II
recipeInstructions: Preheat oven to 350°F. Grease and flour a 9-inch by 13-inch baking pan. Sift the flour and baking powder together and set aside. Cream butter and 1 cup of the sugar until fluffy. Add eggs and 1/2 teaspoon of vanilla, beating well. Gradually add the flour mixture to the butter mixture, 2 tablespoons at a time, mixing until well blended. Pour batter into prepared pan. Bake for 30 minutes at 350°F. Let cool completely. Pierce the cake several times with a fork. Combine the whole milk, evaporated milk, and sweetened condensed milk together. Pour over the cooled cake. Whip the cream, 1 teaspoon vanilla, and 1 cup of sugar until thick. Spread over the top of the cake.
